name: standard
description: Default local benchmark dataset for ingestion, recall, and consolidation.

memories.content: User prefers dark mode for the application interface
Billing invoices are sent on the first of each month
Support team escalation path goes through tier-two engineers
Deployment window for production is Tuesday evenings UTC
New customers receive onboarding email within one hour
API rate limit defaults to one thousand requests per minute
Password reset links expire after thirty minutes
Quarterly roadmap review includes memory and retrieval milestones
